## Alternatives considered


## Scope check

- [ ] This belongs in `@prmaat/mcp` (MCP server) rather than
      `@prmaat/bridge` or the platform backend
- [ ] This stays within MCP's spec (no protocol extensions)
- [ ] This keeps zero runtime dependencies (or has a strong justification
      for adding one)
- [ ] You're willing to help test if a draft PR is opened
